utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final property solution, all 6 items appear with details. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details (name, type, location, features, accessibility, viewing schedule) and price; yes. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (cash purchase using home equity, available amounts, fees, tax treatment); yes. 3) legal_services: includes provider, relationship, cost, services, timeline; yes. 4) moving_services: includes company, specialization, cost, services, timeline; yes. 5) setup_services: includes utilities with providers, costs, timeline; bathroom renovation contractor, cost, work, timeline; survey company, cost, services, timeline; maintenance cost; yes. 6) total_budget: includes cost breakdown lines and totals, ongoing monthly costs, cushion; yes. Therefore all 6/6 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that match items in the ground-truth ratings: Property: Family House; Financing: Cash Purchase; Legal services: Premium Legal Package; Property survey: Full Structural Survey; Moving services: Premium Moving; Utility setup: Premium Utilities. Map each to its corresponding rating.
